rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 49px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/quality-repo-analysis
Analyzes CI/CD, test coverage,
code quality, security, images
Scores each dimension 0-10
Compares against gold standards
Generates HTML + markdown report

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 49px; margin-left: 282px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/historical-bug-coverage
Queries Jira for blocker/critical bugs
Deep test analysis with assertions
Confidence scoring (0-100%)
Generates interactive HTML report

/test-rules-generator

Detects unit, mock, E2E, contract

Framework-aware (Jest, Cypress, Go)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 229px; margin-left: 12px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/konflux-build-simulator
Simulates Konflux build on PRs
Phases: static, Docker, runtime,
module-fed, operator, manifest
Generates GH Actions workflows
Catches build failures pre-merge

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 409px; margin-left: 12px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/risk-assessment
Extracts PR metadata via gh CLI
4 parallel agents: risk, test,
impact, cross-repo
Aggregates scores and decides
Advisory only, never blocks PRs
